subject: Excadrill, a large drill-armed mole-like Pokemon, standing upright against a rocky cave background
description: A large, bipedal mole-like creature stands upright against a dark rocky cave wall. The creature's body is predominantly dark black and teal-grey with a steel-sheen, and it bears long, sharp metallic drill-like claws on both arms — the primary visual identifier of the species. Its posture is upright and confrontational. The background is composed of dark stone and shadow, creating a grim underground atmosphere. The art style is detailed and dynamic.
foreground: large upright mole creature with metallic drill claws extended, dark body with teal-grey plating
background: dark rocky cave wall with shadows
